toggles.name: ppgpp_regulation
toggles.label: ppGpp regulation
toggles.hint: ppGpp is the stringent-response alarmone: high levels slow ribosome synthesis when amino acids are scarce. Disable to use a simplified constant ribosome allocation.

toggles.name: trna_charging
toggles.label: tRNA charging
toggles.hint: Models the enzymatic charging of tRNA with amino acids before each translation step. Disable for a simplified translation model that ignores charging kinetics.

toggles.name: d_period_division
toggles.label: D-period division
toggles.hint: Enforces the D-period: a fixed delay between finishing DNA replication and cell division. Disable to allow division immediately after replication completes.

toggles.name: translation_supply
toggles.label: Translation supply
toggles.hint: Links ribosome elongation rate to the instantaneous amino acid supply. Disable to use a fixed average elongation rate regardless of nutrient availability.

toggles.name: superhelical_density
toggles.label: Superhelical density
toggles.hint: Models the effect of DNA supercoiling on transcription rates. Enable for a more mechanistic treatment of transcription; increases simulation time.

toggles.name: variable_elongation_transcription
toggles.label: Variable elongation (transcription)
toggles.hint: Allows RNAP elongation speed to vary per gene rather than using a single average rate. Enables more realistic transcript length distributions.

toggles.name: variable_elongation_translation
toggles.label: Variable elongation (translation)
toggles.hint: Allows ribosome elongation speed to vary per mRNA rather than using a single average rate. Enables more realistic protein synthesis dynamics.

toggles.name: mechanistic_translation_supply
toggles.label: Mechanistic translation supply
toggles.hint: Uses a detailed kinetic model of amino acid supply to ribosomes instead of a lumped flux. More accurate but significantly slower to simulate.

toggles.name: mechanistic_aa_transport
toggles.label: Mechanistic AA transport
toggles.hint: Models amino acid import and export across the inner membrane mechanistically. Enable to study transporter saturation effects during nutrient shifts.

toggles.name: trna_attenuation
toggles.label: tRNA attenuation
toggles.hint: Models tRNA-mediated transcriptional attenuation of amino acid biosynthesis operons (e.g. trp, his). Enable for a more detailed treatment of biosynthetic gene regulation.

presets.label: 🧫 Wildtype baseline
presets.description: Single wildtype cell in minimal media — the standard reference simulation.

presets.label: 📈 Nutrient upshift (add amino acids)
presets.description: Cell growing in minimal media, then amino acids added at 20 min. Watch growth rate accelerate.

config.description: Nutrient upshift: minimal → minimal+AA at t=1200s

presets.label: 📉 Nutrient downshift (remove amino acids)
presets.description: Cell growing in rich media (with amino acids), then amino acids removed at 20 min. Watch ppGpp stress response.

config.description: Nutrient downshift: minimal+AA → minimal at t=1200s

presets.label: 🔴 Switch to anaerobic
presets.description: Cell growing aerobically, then oxygen removed at 20 min. Watch metabolism shift.

config.description: Anaerobic shift: minimal → minimal-oxygen at t=1200s

presets.label: ⚡ Rich media (fast growth)
presets.description: Wildtype cell growing in minimal+amino acids media. Compare growth rate and ribosome allocation to minimal.

presets.label: 🎲 Wildtype × 3 seeds
presets.description: Three independent wildtype cells with different random seeds — shows cell-to-cell variability.

presets.label: ⚠️ ppGpp sweep (starvation signal)
presets.description: Three ppGpp levels: low (0.4×), control (1×), high (1.6×). High ppGpp mimics amino acid starvation — watch ribosome counts drop.

presets.label: 🐢 Slow growth (acetate carbon source)
presets.description: Acetate as sole carbon source — much slower growth than glucose. Compare mass accumulation and ribosome allocation.

config.description: Slow growth: acetate carbon source (condition index 2)
